AI Automation Engineer

Remote – Canada

Greenhouse Demo LLC is a fast-moving startup automating telecom operations with AI.

What you'll do

  • Build agentic workflows that automate billing reconciliation.
  • Integrate LLM-based decision systems with our microservices stack.
  • Own end-to-end automation from data ingestion to action.

You bring

  • Production experience with LLMs, RAG, or agent frameworks.
  • Strong Python, REST API design, and microservices.
  • Bonus: Java/Spring background, AWS, CI/CD.
